name: @hyperprior/pi-commit
description: Git commit helper tooling for pi
readme:
# @hyperprior/pi-commit

Git commit helpers (`hyperpi_commit` tool + `/hyper-commit` command).

## Installation\n
```bash
pi install npm:@hyperprior/pi-commit
```

## Notes

All plugins in this monorepo are namespaced under `@hyperprior` and built to be loaded as individual pi packages.
